subcodes.title: Letter to the wife of the Bab
subcodes.first_line: Although from the revolution of earth and heavens and the succession of night and day it is evident that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو العزیز. اگرچه از انقلاب ارض افلاک و نقلبات لیل و نهار ظاهر است که چه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
